goal: Suggest preprocessing and feature-engineering actions for forecasting daily restaurant visitors from Recruit reservation, visitation, store, and calendar tables under the RMSLE evaluation metric.

task_characteristics.analysis_notes: Multi-table restaurant demand forecasting task built from eight zipped CSV files spanning two reservation ecosystems plus calendar and store lookups. The largest benchmark-relevant table is hpg_reserve.csv with 2,000,320 reservation rows, pushing the task into the xlarge bucket despite a low 17-column case-insensitive union. The prediction index covers 821 air stores across 39 future dates, while the historical air_visit_data table covers 829 stores from 2016-01-01 through 2017-04-22. The current curated new-eval bank keeps 20 good actions overall, of which 12 are core_preprocessing actions around reservation lead-time, grouped store-date reservation aggregates, visit-date decomposition, store-weekday visitor histories, and lookup joins; the raw complexity value is normalized to that primary-effective core count.

overview.title: Recruit Restaurant Visitor Forecasting
overview.summary: Predict how many future visitors a restaurant will receive
overview.raw_text: Historical public references describe this as a Featured Kaggle forecasting competition sponsored by Recruit Holdings. Participants used reservation, visitation, store, and holiday/calendar tables from two Japanese restaurant platforms to predict future daily visitor counts for selected air stores. Public historical references indicate a $25,000 prize pool, 2,158 teams, and RMSLE scoring. The exact launch timestamp was not preserved in the local collection artifacts used for authoring this task, so enabled_date is normalized to the earliest observed public notebook run timestamp as a lower-bound proxy rather than a claimed official launch time.

dataset_description.summary: Eight zipped CSV tables combine daily air visitor counts, air/hpg reservation logs, store metadata, a cross-system id bridge, a holiday calendar, and a submission index for 39 future forecast dates.
dataset_description.raw_text: The downloadable competition data consists of eight .csv.zip files. air_visit_data.csv.zip is the supervised history table with 252,108 rows of daily visitor counts for 829 air restaurants from 2016-01-01 through 2017-04-22. sample_submission.csv.zip provides 32,019 forecast targets, covering 821 air restaurants across 39 dates from 2017-04-23 through 2017-05-31, with each prediction row keyed by an id formed from air_store_id and visit_date. Reservation evidence comes from air_reserve.csv.zip (92,378 rows across 314 air stores) and hpg_reserve.csv.zip (2,000,320 rows across 13,325 hpg stores), linked through store_id_relation.csv.zip for the 150 stores that appear in both systems. air_store_info.csv.zip and hpg_store_info.csv.zip provide genre, area, latitude, and longitude metadata, while date_info.csv.zip provides day-of-week and Japanese holiday flags for 517 calendar dates. Across the benchmark-relevant files, the case-insensitive raw column union is 17 columns.
